arts.ttl: Liverpool, Man Utd’s €55M-Rated Target With PSG Clause Breaks Silence on Future
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain took a short-term approach last year by sending Xavi Simons back to RB Leipzig on loan. Now, things are more settled—Simons has officially joined Leipzig on a permanent deal. That might actually work out in PSG’s favor. A new report has raised questions about Simons’ attitude during his loan spell, which could’ve caused […] The post Liverpool, Man Utd’s €55M-Rated Target With PSG Clause Breaks Silence on Future appeared first on PSG Talk.

arts.ttl: PSG Set Sights Again on Real Madrid, Tottenham Target With Bournemouth Exit Looming
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain showed interest in Dean Huijsen last summer as part of their defensive overhaul, but the Spanish center-back chose a move to AFC Bournemouth instead. If PSG come back in for him, they won’t be the only ones in the race. Despite signing Willian Pacho, PSG could still be looking for another center-back, especially […] The post PSG Set Sights Again on Real Madrid, Tottenham Target With Bournemouth Exit Looming appeared first on PSG Talk.

arts.ttl: Liverpool Plot Blockbuster Summer Move for Aston Villa Ace Wanted by Man Utd, PSG
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain’s recent showings against Liverpool and Aston Villa may have caught the attention of some English players, especially as more are starting to explore opportunities outside the Premier League. Back in January, CaughtOffside reported that PSG were keeping tabs on Morgan Rogers, citing sources who said the club had been impressed with his performances […] The post Liverpool Plot Blockbuster Summer Move for Aston Villa Ace Wanted by Man Utd, PSG appeared first on PSG Talk.

arts.ttl: 'I was fuming': Ollie Watkins slams PSG snub as Emery hails positive reaction
arts.sum: Watkins was furious to be dropped but used the anger as motivation to come back stronger

arts.ttl: Chelsea Outcast Urged to Make Shock PSG Move After AC Milan Loan Comes to End
arts.sum: Over the years, João Félix has struggled to find a place where his talent shines, whether Atletico Madrid, Chelsea, Barcelona, or AC Milan. None of these moves have become a long-term home for the Portugal international. Félix left Chelsea to go on loan to the Serie A side, but Milan’s decision to keep the player […] The post Chelsea Outcast Urged to Make Shock PSG Move After AC Milan Loan Comes to End appeared first on PSG Talk.

arts.ttl: Luis Enrique: "It's important to keep this positive dynamic"
arts.sum: The Paris Saint-Germain coach and Ibrahim Mbaye spoke to PSG TV after the league win over Le Havre. Playing after the Champions League knockout game against Aston Villa, we made a lot of changes in terms of players and I think it was a very important test for me and very important for the players.

arts.ttl: Luis Enrique's Post-Match Press Conference After PSG Beat Le Havre
arts.sum: PSG dominated Le Havre in their Ligue 1 encounter on Saturday but managed just a 2-1 victory. After so many missed chances, they were lucky the away team didn't take any of theirs to level the game. Goals from Desire Doue and Goncalo Ramos earned the three points. See all the reaction from Luis Enrique.

arts.ttl: Paris defeat Le Havre to cap a fine week
arts.sum: Early on, the hosts set the pace and Barcola found Doué from the left, and he then burst past Étienne Youté before beating Mathieu Gorgelin for the opening goal (1-0, 8') ! A few days after qualifying for the Champions League semi-finals at Aston Villa, Paris Saint-Germain were back home for their Ligue 1 Matchday 30 game with Le Havre.

arts.ttl: PSG - Le Havre : Les compos (17h sur Beinsports 1)
arts.sum: Compo du PSG Safonov, Hakimi, Hernandez, Beraldo, Mbaye, Zaire-Emery, Mayulu- Doué, Kang-In, Barcola...

arts.ttl: Luís Campos preparing for next season with PSG but could leave if…
arts.sum: As the end of the season approaches, Luís Campos’ future at Paris Saint-Germain remains unresolved. Whilst Luis Enrique confirmed his stay at PSG back in February, Campos is yet to…
